name: Sirolimus older-adults trial is recruiting with no posted results
summary: NCT05237687 is the existing public Rapalogs activity item, but it remains recruiting no-results context and should not carry efficacy interpretation by itself.
statement: ClinicalTrials.gov lists NCT05237687 as a recruiting randomized phase 2 sirolimus trial in older adults, with SASP index, walking speed, chair stand, balance, grip strength, body composition, and feasibility endpoints and no posted results in the June 14, 2026 API view.
population_or_model: Older adults in a small randomized sirolimus prevention trial
quantitative_note: Estimated enrollment is 10; estimated primary completion is September 2027; estimated study completion is November 2027; results were not posted in the June 14, 2026 API view.
caveats: Recruiting registry status is not evidence of benefit.
The planned sample is very small.
The trial can become more important if it reports functional outcomes alongside interpretable SASP or aging-biomarker changes.
